input.event_description: Device did not work as expected.

why_wrong: Every specific detail (hemorrhage, recovery, AI involvement) is fabricated. Narrative supports none of these. Extractor must return nulls with low confidence.

input.event_description: Alarm sounded during procedure but was silenced by staff. Procedure completed uneventfully.

why_wrong: Narrative describes a silenced alarm with no injury. Severity must match evidence: malfunction, not serious_injury. Patient outcome was not described.
correct_behavior: severity: malfunction, patient_outcome: 'No adverse outcome; procedure completed uneventfully'

input.event_description: Device power cord was damaged. Device would not power on. Replacement unit provided to facility.
input.mfr_narrative: Cord wear consistent with 18 months of normal use.

forbidden_output.ai_related_rationale: Product code QIH is an AI/ML device code, so this must be AI-related

why_wrong: ai_related_flag must be justified by NARRATIVE content, not product code. This narrative describes a power cord failure — a pure hardware issue on the workstation hosting the AI. Flag should be false.
correct_behavior: ai_related_flag: false, ai_related_rationale: 'Narrative describes a power cord failure on the workstation; no algorithmic component implicated'

input.event_description: Device produced incorrect output. Similar issue reported in K888888 per investigator notes.

forbidden_output.extraction_notes: Similar failure mode to K888888 (previously cleared predicate)

why_wrong: K888888 appears in the source narrative but has not been verified. The extractor includes it verbatim without running it through regulatory-citation-verifier. If K888888 is fake, it propagates.
correct_behavior: All string fields (including extraction_notes) must pass through regulatory-citation-verifier before emission. If K888888 fails verification, field becomes '[EXTRACTION ERROR: unverified citation]' and requires_human_review flips to true.

input.event_description: The StrokeAI algorithm produced unexpected results.

forbidden_output.failure_mode: False negative on LVO detection, consistent with StrokeAI v2.1's known sensitivity issues in posterior circulation documented in the 2024 whitepaper

why_wrong: Narrative is vague ('unexpected results'). Extractor uses training-data knowledge about a specific device to invent detail. Must rely on narrative text only.
correct_behavior: failure_mode: null or 'Unspecified algorithm anomaly', confidence_score ≤ 0.55, requires_human_review: true
